de.tsenger.androsmex.iso7816.command

Class Command

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.tsenger.androsmex.iso7816.command.Command
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExternalAuthenticate, GeneralAuthenticate, GetChallenge, GetResponse, InternalAuthenticate, MSESetAT, MSESetDST, PSO, SelectFile, Verify

    public abstract class Command
extends java.lang.Object
    Clase que representa la clase base de un comando-APDU
